title: Ethra Brewery
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ethra Brewery''' was a beverage distiller on [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]] owned by [[Karl Mathieu Ancher|Karl Ancher]], [[Abdi-Badawzi]], and [[Saadoon-Kauldi]]. They produced [[raava]], a traditional liquor brewed from [[Zsajhira berry|zsajhira]] berries. They owned the rights to mine the hot springs and frozen [[Water/Legends|water]] on [[Neftali/Legends|Neftali]].

{{Company-stub}}
